## Summary

Describe the purpose of this pull request and the problem it solves.

## Changes

- List the main technical or functional changes.

## Validation

- [ ] `./gradlew test`
- [ ] `./gradlew lint`
- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] Tested on an emulator or physical device when Android behavior is affected

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated work
- [ ] Tests cover the relevant business logic
- [ ] Documentation is updated when required
- [ ] No sensitive or local-only files are committed
- [ ] Known Android limitations are documented explicitly
